title: lens culinaris var. villosa
intro: Lens culinaris var. villosa, also known as hairy or villous lentil, is a variety of the lentil plant, characterized by its hairy or villous stems and leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lens culinaris var. villosa include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anti-cancer agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate various conditions.
